data.current_summary: Send search terms to receive the most relevant articles and companies.
data.summary_suggestion: Search for relevant articles and companies by keywords
data.description_suggestion: Searches for articles and companies matching the provided search terms. Accepts a query parameter containing one or more keywords. Returns a list of the most relevant articles and companies ranked by relevance. This endpoint is part of the ContentPro feature set and may require additional access permissions. Requires API key authentication.

data.current_summary: The /contentpro-similar-text endpoint accepts and arbitrary piece of text and returns similar articles and blogs written by companies.
data.summary_suggestion: Find similar articles and company content by text
data.description_suggestion: Accepts arbitrary text input and returns articles and blog posts from companies with similar content. The request body should contain the text to match against. Returns a ranked list of similar articles and company-authored content based on semantic similarity. This endpoint is part of the ContentPro feature set and may require additional access permissions. Requires API key authentication.

data.current_summary: Send a company website to receive a list of companies related to them.
data.summary_suggestion: Find companies similar to a specified company
data.description_suggestion: Identifies and returns a list of companies similar to a specified company based on their website or company identifier. Accepts query parameters for the target company (website URL or company identifier) and optional filtering criteria. Returns a ranked list of related companies with similarity scores or relevance indicators. Useful for competitive analysis and market research. Requires API key authentication.
